# Fermin Silva

> Software engineer focused on backend and fintech, based in Buenos Aires. Also a photographer.

## About

Fermin Silva is a Staff Engineer at Pomelo (fintech), with 10+ years of backend experience across Go, Java, and distributed systems. Previously at Toptal, Binlogic, MercadoLibre, and OLX.

## Pages

- [Home](https://fermin-silva.github.io/): Portfolio hub
- [Work](https://fermin-silva.github.io/work/): Full work experience, education history, and LinkedIn contact
- [Projects](https://fermin-silva.github.io/projects/): Software projects built by Fermin
- [Photos](https://fermin-silva.github.io/photos/): Photography and artistic projects

## GymLog (Rutina)

GymLog is a bilingual (English/Spanish) PWA for tracking gym routines week by week. Built with Jekyll and vanilla JS. Free, open, installable on mobile.

- [GymLog App](https://fermin-silva.github.io/rutina/): Main app — lists all available routines
- [Full Body Routine](https://fermin-silva.github.io/rutina/routines/fullbody/): All major muscle groups in one session. Compound lifts, maximum efficiency. Includes: Squat, Deadlift, Bench Press, Overhead Press, Pull Ups, Bent Over Row, Hip Thrust, Hack Squat, Lat Pulldown, Face Pull, Biceps Curl, Triceps extensions, and more.
- [Push Pull Legs Routine](https://fermin-silva.github.io/rutina/routines/ppl/): Three-day split by movement pattern. Push: Bench Press, Overhead Press, Lateral Raises, Tricep Dips. Pull: Pull Ups, Barbell Row, Bicep Curl, Face Pulls. Legs: Squat, Romanian Deadlift, Leg Press, Calf Raise.
